From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

A **[double bass](/wiki/Double_bass "Double bass")** is a string instrument.

Double bass may also refer to:

## Musical instruments

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Double_bass_(disambiguation)&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Musical instruments")]

* [Electric double bass](/wiki/Electric_double_bass "Electric double bass")
* [Double-bass drum](/wiki/Double-bass_drum "Double-bass drum")

## Other uses

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Double_bass_(disambiguation)&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Other uses")]

* [Double bass array](/wiki/Double_bass_array "Double bass array"), a layout of loudspeakers
* [*Double Bass* (album)](/wiki/Double_Bass_(album) "Double Bass (album)"), a 1976 album by Niels-Henning Ørsted Pedersen and Sam Jones
* *[Der Kontrabaß](/wiki/Der_Kontraba%C3%9F "Der Kontrabaß")*, a 1981 play by Patrick Süskind translated to English as *The Double Bass*
* "Double Bass", a song from the 2001 Gorillaz [self titled album](/wiki/Gorillaz_(album) "Gorillaz (album)")

## See also

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Double_bass_(disambiguation)&action=edit&section=3 "Edit section: See also")]

* [All pages with titles containing *Double bass*](/wiki/Special:Search/intitle:%22Double_bass%22 "Special:Search/intitle:\"Double bass\"")
* [Contrabass](/wiki/Contrabass "Contrabass")
